title: Furlow
overview: Sumittar Singh, a tailor-turned-food inspector, enjoys the newfound power, respect, and bribes his position brings. As he starts raiding businesses and clashes with a local don, he inadvertently becomes a hero to the villagers. Will Sumittar`s rise to power end in his success or downfall?

trailers.title: FURLOW (Official Trailer) Gurpreet Ghuggi | Love Gill | Honey Mattu | In Cinemas 10th January 2025
